description_long: This is a compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a boxy receiver and a short barrel, designed for close-quarters use. The weapon features a prominent pistol grip and a detachable box magazine inserted vertically in front of the trigger guard. The upper receiver is flat and streamlined, with simple iron sights mounted at the front and rear. The stock is a minimalist, folding design, allowing for easy storage and maneuverability in tight urban environments. The surface is matte black, likely finished with a durable coating to resist wear and corrosion. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with polymer components for the grip and possibly the stock.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a folding stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. Its design is streamlined for urban close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short barrel, narrow profile, and front iron sight.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the folding stock, pistol grip, magazine, and overall compactness.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rear iron sight, stock attachment, and magazine alignment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, folding stock, and magazine placement.
